title: Hinduja Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hinduja Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!
